title: Q&A Session April 26th
excerpt:
Like every week, you can join us in our Q&A session on April 26th 14:00 GMT :muscle: 
Topics: 

API
Apps framework (building of custom apps)

If you have questions or issues we can help you with (regarding these topics),…

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Like every week, you can join us in our Q&A session on April 26th 14:00 GMT

Topics:

  • API
  • Apps framework (building of custom apps)

If you have questions or issues we can help you with (regarding these topics), or if you just want to listen other devs and what they are doing with monday, this is the right place for you!

You can book your spot here !

See you there

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @katlaj!

We have a session once a week on Tuesdays at 14:00 GMT!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: katlaj (Kirstin Stenlund)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks. When I click on the link, I am unable to register for a class. ?

When I click on the link below (highlighted in yellow), I see this:

image001.png831×710 26.8 KB

I try the next month and I can’t sign up for anything.

When I click on Central Time, it does nothing. I don’t see a register button. I can’t choose any other day.

image002.png889×775 25.4 KB

Can you give me another link?

posts.author: katlaj (Kirstin Stenlund)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Your link works for me. When I click on the day, I am able to sign up for the 9am CST class on May 3rd and May 10th.

In the screenshots I provided with my original email, I was unable to sign up for the class on May 10th and May 3rd wasn’t even an option. When I clicked on the day nothing happened. There was something wrong with the site yesterday.
